caption: In the video, a person is engaged in a crafting activity on a grid-lined cutting mat. They are holding a small container of glitter labeled "Brilliant Stampin' Glitter Gel" with their left hand and using their right hand to point at the label, possibly explaining its features or usage. In the background, there is a blue cardstock with a snowflake pattern and some white dots, suggesting that the glitter might be used for embellishing the card. To the left, there is a stamp set with various designs, indicating that this is part of a larger card-making project. The person appears to be demonstrating or discussing the materials and techniques involved in creating a decorative card.
